name: Tuna Starter

ingredients.item: unsalted pistachio nuts, toasted and roughly chopped

method: Serves 4–6 400 g canned tuna in oil, drained 50 g unsalted pistachio nuts, toasted and roughly chopped 25 g capers in brine, drained 6–8 cornichons (gherkins) in brine, drained and diced 125 ml good-quality virgin olive oil
Combine the tuna, pistachios, capers, and cornichons in a mixing bowl. Add the olive oil and use a fork to mix them together roughly – I prefer it to be a bit chunky.
Serve with crusty sourdough bread or lingue di suocera (Impasto per Pizza).
